name: Dazai Osamu
description:
<<Care for a drink, darling? Another? How 'bout another?>>

Toxic relationship au and Dazai is being petty

·

Tw: alcohol, addiction, coercion

·

I got this idea while remembering the 55 minutes novel where Dazai force feeds that one guy pudding to get what they needed. I loved that little detail so much actually, been wanting to make something related to it.

I feel so odd! I need to start interacting with people in real life again because what the fuck. Yes I have social anxiety but I will go insane if I don't have someone to talk to face to face.
creator: Ammuuu
